name: Spiced Rum & Pineapple
description: A simple tropical highball that combines BACARDÍ Spiced rum with pineapple juice over ice. BACARDÍ Spiced into pineapple juice to spice up a sweet drink. It's easy to make and even easier to impress friends. Packed with vibrant tropical flavour, this cocktail is sunshine in a glass.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball or Tiki glass with cubed or crushed ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum.
Add chilled pineapple juice. Give it all a gentle stir.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf.
